action.reasoning: Observation: DDP crashes because CLIP model has unused parameters (text encoder). Analysis: Need to only use vision encoder, not full CLIP model. Decision: Fix model.py to extract only vision encoder, and set find_unused_parameters=True as backup. Also need to check model.py content.
